data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): BFS direction — check_cycle_at_level(source, target, level, tracker_dir) must BFS starting from target_id and traverse depends_on/blocks edges among tickets where ticket_type.lower() == level.lower(), checking whether source_id is reachable. Starting BFS from source (wrong direction) misses cycles. Add: Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_ticket_graph.py::test_check_cycle_at_level_bfs_direction -x (add a test that specifically verifies BFS direction is target→source, not source→target)
